saubhadro draupadeyāśca sarva eva mahārathāḥ sarva+eva · bhīṣmamevābhirakṣantu bhavantaḥ sarva eva hi sarva+eva · yotsyamānānavekṣe 'haṃ ya ete 'tra samāgatāḥ ya+ete · nānavāptamavāptavyaṃ varta eva ca karmaṇi varta+eva

sa ghoṣo dhārtarāṣṭrāṇāṃ hṛdayāni vyadārayat ghoṣo+dhārtarāṣṭrāṇāṃ · ahamevākṣayaḥ kālo dhātāhaṃ viśvatomukhaḥ kālo+dhātā · śauryaṃ tejo dhṛtirdākṣyaṃ yuddhe cāpyapalāyanam tejo+dhṛtiḥ · buddhyā viśuddhayā yukto dhṛtyātmānaṃ niyamya ca yukto+dhṛtya

yāvadetānnirīkṣe 'haṃ yoddhukāmānavasthitān nirīkṣe+'haṃ · yotsyamānānavekṣe 'haṃ ya ete 'tra samāgatāḥ avekṣe+'haṃ · yacchreyaḥ syānniścitaṃ brūhi tanme śiṣyaste 'haṃ śādhi māṃ tvāṃ prapannam te+'haṃ · jñānaṃ te 'haṃ savijñānamidaṃ vakṣyāmyaśeṣataḥ te+'haṃ

dhārtarāṣṭrā raṇe hanyustanme kṣemataraṃ bhavet dhārtarāṣṭrā+raṇe · ye caiva sāttvikā bhāvā rājasāstāmasāśca ye bhāvā+rājasāḥ · sa tayā śraddhayā yuktastasyā rādhanamīhate tasyāḥ→yuktastasyā +rādhanam · kiṃ punarbrāhmaṇāḥ puṇyā bhaktā rājarṣayastathā bhaktā+rājarṣayaḥ

karmajaṃ buddhiyuktā hi phalaṃ tyaktvā manīṣiṇaḥ yuktāḥ→buddhiyuktā +hi · vaktumarhasyaśeṣeṇa divyā hyātmavibhūtayaḥ divyā+hi · hanta te kathayiṣyāmi divyā hyātmavibhūtayaḥ divyā+hi · rasyāḥ snigdhāḥ sthirā hṛdyā āhārāḥ sāttvikapriyāḥ sthirā+hṛdyā

yajñārthātkarmaṇo 'nyatra loko 'yaṃ karmabandhanaḥ loko+'yaṃ · atha kena prayukto 'yaṃ pāpaṃ carati pūruṣaḥ prayukto+'yaṃ · yo 'yaṃ yogastvayā proktaḥ sāmyena madhusūdana yo+'yaṃ · mūḍho 'yaṃ nābhijānāti loko māmajamavyayam mūḍho+'yaṃ

tairdattānapradāyaibhyo yo bhuṅkte stena eva saḥ taiḥ+dattān→tairdattānapradāyaibhyo · na hi te bhagavanvyaktiṃ vidurdevā na dānavāḥ viduḥ+devāḥ→vidurdevā · avyaktā hi gatirduḥkhaṃ dehavadbhiravāpyate gatiḥ+duḥkham→gatirduḥkhaṃ · anapekṣaḥ śucirdakṣa udāsīno gatavyathaḥ śuciḥ+dakṣaḥ→śucirdakṣa

prakṛterguṇasaṃmūḍhāḥ sajjante guṇakarmasu prakṛteḥ+guṇa→prakṛterguṇasaṃmūḍhāḥ · tribhirguṇamayairbhāvairebhiḥ sarvamidaṃ jagat tribhiḥ+guṇa→tribhirguṇamayairbhāvairebhiḥ · pitāsi lokasya carācarasya tvamasya pūjyaśca gururgarīyān guruḥ+garīyān→gururgarīyān · dvaṃdvairvimuktāḥ sukhaduḥkhasaṃjñair gacchanty amūḍhāḥ padamavyayaṃ tat saṃjñaiḥ→sukhaduḥkhasaṃjñair +gacchanty

yadā yadā hi dharmasya glānirbhavati bhārata glāniḥ+bhavati→glānirbhavati · kṣipraṃ hi mānuṣe loke siddhirbhavati karmajā siddhiḥ+bhavati→siddhirbhavati · gatirbhartā prabhuḥ sākṣī nivāsaḥ śaraṇaṃ suhṛt gatiḥ+bhartā→gatirbhartā · buddherbhedaṃ dhṛteścaiva guṇatastrividhaṃ śṛṇu buddheḥ+bhedam→buddherbhedaṃ

ayatiḥ śraddhayopeto yogāccalitamānasaḥ yogāt+calita→yogāccalitamānasaḥ · kasmācca te na nameranmahātmangarīyase brahmaṇo 'pyādikartre kasmāt+ca→kasmācca · tatkṣetraṃ yacca yādṛkca yadvikāri yataśca yat yat+ca→yacca · yaccandramasi yaccāgnau tattejo viddhi māmakam yat+candramasi→yaccandramasi

na me viduḥ suragaṇāḥ prabhavaṃ na maharṣayaḥ mahā+ṛṣayaḥ→maharṣayaḥ · ahamādirhi devānāṃ maharṣīṇāṃ ca sarvaśaḥ mahā+ṛṣīṇām→maharṣīṇāṃ · maharṣayaḥ sapta pūrve catvāro manavastathā mahā+ṛṣayaḥ→maharṣayaḥ · maharṣīṇāṃ bhṛgurahaṃ girāmasmyekamakṣaram mahā+ṛṣīṇām→maharṣīṇāṃ

kālo 'smi lokakṣayakṛtpravṛddho lokānsamāhartumiha pravṛttaḥ pravṛddhaḥ→lokakṣayakṛtpravṛddho +lokān · tasmāttvamuttiṣṭha yaśo labhasva jitvā śatrūnbhuṅkṣva rājyaṃ samṛddham yaśo+labhasva · yasmānnodvijate loko lokānnodvijate ca yaḥ loko+lokāt · sattvātsaṃjāyate jñānaṃ rajaso lobha eva ca rajaso+lobha

kiṃ no rājyena govinda kiṃ bhogairjīvitena vā no+rājyena · yeṣāmarthe kāṅkṣitaṃ no rājyaṃ bhogāḥ sukhāni ca no+rājyaṃ · dhūmo rātristathā kṛṣṇaḥ ṣaṇmāsā dakṣiṇāyanam dhūmo+rātriḥ · rajo rāgātmakaṃ viddhi tṛṣṇāsaṅgasamudbhavam rajo+rāga

yadrājyasukhalobhena hantuṃ svajanamudyatāḥ yat+rājya→yadrājyasukhalobhena · bhayādraṇāduparataṃ maṃsyante tvāṃ mahārathāḥ bhayāt+raṇāt→bhayādraṇāduparataṃ · kriyate bahulāyāsaṃ tadrājasamudāhṛtam tat+rājasam→tadrājasamudāhṛtam · abhyāsādramate yatra duḥkhāntaṃ ca nigacchati abhyāsāt+ramate→abhyāsādramate

tathā dehāntaraprāptir dhīrastatra na muhyati prāptiḥ→dehāntaraprāptir +dhīraḥ · jātasya hi dhruvo mṛtyur dhruvaṃ janma mṛtasya ca mṛtyur+dhruvaṃ · yatra yogeśvaraḥ kṛṣṇo yatra pārtho dhanurdharaḥ dhanuḥ+dharaḥ→dhanurdharaḥ · tatra śrīrvijayo bhūtirdhruvā nītirmatirmama bhūtiḥ+dhruvā→bhūtirdhruvā

kriyāviśeṣabahulāṃ bhogaiśvaryagatiṃ prati bhoga+aiśvarya→bhogaiśvaryagatiṃ · bhogaiśvaryaprasaktānāṃ tayāpahṛtacetasām bhoga+aiśvarya→bhogaiśvaryaprasaktānāṃ · ātmaupamyena sarvatra samaṃ paśyati yo 'rjuna ātma+aupamyena→ātmaupamyena · śāśvatasya ca dharmasya sukhasyaikāntikasya ca sukhasya+aikāntikasya→sukhasyaikāntikasya

guṇā guṇeṣu vartanta iti matvā na sajjate guṇā+guṇeṣu · tatra prayātā gacchanti brahma brahmavido janāḥ prayātā+gacchanti · evaṃ trayīdharmamanuprapannā gatāgataṃ kāmakāmā labhante anuprapannāḥ→trayīdharmamanuprapannā +gata · adhaścordhvaṃ prasṛtāstasya śākhā guṇapravṛddhā viṣayapravālāḥ śākhā+guṇa

bhūya eva mahābāho śṛṇu me paramaṃ vacaḥ bhūya+eva · namaskṛtvā bhūya evāha kṛṣṇaṃ sagadgadaṃ bhītabhītaḥ praṇamya bhūya+eva · namaḥ purastādatha pṛṣṭhataste namo 'stu te sarvata eva sarva sarvata+eva · tata eva ca vistāraṃ brahma sampadyate tadā tata+eva

paryāptaṃ tvidameteṣāṃ balaṃ bhīmābhirakṣitam tu+idam→tvidameteṣāṃ · eṣā te 'bhihitā sāṃkhye buddhir yoge tvimāṃ śṛṇu tu+imām→tvimāṃ · sukhaṃ tvidānīṃ trividhaṃ śṛṇu me bharatarṣabha tu+idānīm→tvidānīṃ

tataḥ śvetairhayairyukte mahati syandane sthitau śvetaiḥ+hayaiḥ→śvetairhayairyukte · bhūyaḥ kathaya tṛptirhi śṛṇvato nāsti me 'mṛtam tṛptiḥ+hi→tṛptirhi · asau mayā hataḥ śatrur haniṣye cāparānapi śatrur+haniṣye
na tvevāhaṃ jātu nāsaṃ na tvaṃ neme janādhipāḥ tu+eva→tvevāhaṃ · ye tvetadabhyasūyanto nānutiṣṭhanti me matam tu+etat→tvetadabhyasūyanto · anye tv evam ajānantaḥ śrutvānyebhya upāsate tv+evam
nityaḥ sarvagataḥ sthāṇuracalo 'yaṃ sanātanaḥ acalaḥ+'yaṃ · dehī nityam avadhyo 'yaṃ dehe sarvasya bhārata vadhyaḥ+'yaṃ · śraddhāmayo 'yaṃ puruṣo yo yacchraddhaḥ sa eva saḥ mayaḥ+'yaṃ

kuryād vidvāṃs tathāsaktaś cikīrṣur lokasaṃgraham cikīrṣur+loka · kairliṅgaistrīnguṇānetānatīto bhavati prabho kaiḥ+liṅgaiḥ→kairliṅgaistrīnguṇānetānatīto · naṣṭo mohaḥ smṛtirlabdhā tvatprasādānmayācyuta smṛtiḥ+labdhā→smṛtirlabdhā

ajo 'pi sannavyayātmā bhūtānāmīśvaro 'pi san san+avyaya→sannavyayātmā · sarvabhūtātmabhūtātmā kurvannapi na lipyate kurvan+api→kurvannapi · samaṃ kāyaśirogrīvaṃ dhārayannacalaṃ sthiraḥ dhārayan+acalam→dhārayannacalaṃ

śraddhāvāṃllabhate jñānaṃ tatparaḥ saṃyatendriyaḥ śraddhāvān+labhate→śraddhāvāṃllabhate · hatvāpi sa imāṃllokānna hanti na nibadhyate imān+lokān→imāṃllokānna · so 'pi muktaḥ śubhāṃllokānprāpnuyātpuṇyakarmaṇām śubhān+lokān→śubhāṃllokānprāpnuyātpuṇyakarmaṇām

yogayukto munirbrahma nacireṇādhigacchati muniḥ+brahma→munirbrahma · buddhirbuddhimatāmasmi tejastejasvināmaham buddhiḥ+buddhimatām→buddhirbuddhimatāmasmi · ṛṣibhirbahudhā gītaṃ chandobhirvividhaiḥ pṛthak ṛṣibhiḥ+bahudhā→ṛṣibhirbahudhā

nirdoṣaṃ hi samaṃ brahma tasmādbrahmaṇi te sthitāḥ tasmāt+brahmaṇi→tasmādbrahmaṇi · kiṃ tadbrahma kimadhyātmaṃ kiṃ karma puruṣottama tat+brahma→tadbrahma · etadbuddhvā buddhimānsyātkṛtakṛtyaśca bhārata etat+buddhvā→etadbuddhvā

yajjñātvā neha bhūyo 'nyajjñātavyamavaśiṣyate bhūyo+anyat · anekabāhūdaravaktranetraṃ paśyāmi tvā sarvato 'nantarūpam sarvato+ananta · etajjñānamiti proktam ajñānaṃ yadato 'nyathā atas→yadato +'nyathā
labhate ca tataḥ kāmānmayaiva vihitānhi tān tataḥ+kāmān · bhūyaḥ kathaya tṛptirhi śṛṇvato nāsti me 'mṛtam bhūyaḥ+kathaya · sarvakarmaphalatyāgaṃ tataḥ kuru yatātmavān tataḥ+kuru
aśraddadhānāḥ puruṣā dharmasyāsya paraṃtapa puruṣā+dharmasya · ātmasaṃbhāvitāḥ stabdhā dhanamānamadānvitāḥ stabdhā+dhana · na vimuñcati durmedhā dhṛtiḥ sā pārtha tāmasī durmedhā+dhṛtiḥ

kalpakṣaye punastāni kalpādau visṛjāmyaham punar+tāni→punastāni · nāntaṃ na madhyaṃ na punastavādiṃ paśyāmi viśveśvara viśvarūpa punar+tava→punastavādiṃ · vyapetabhīḥ prītamanāḥ punastvaṃ tadeva me rūpamidaṃ prapaśya punar+tvam→punastvaṃ

patraṃ puṣpaṃ phalaṃ toyaṃ yo me bhaktyā prayacchati puṣpaṃ+phalaṃ · karmaṇaḥ sukṛtasyāhuḥ sāttvikaṃ nirmalaṃ phalam nirmalaṃ+phalam · yattu pratyupakārārthaṃ phalamuddiśya vā punaḥ artham→pratyupakārārthaṃ +phalam
samo 'haṃ sarvabhūteṣu na me dveṣyo 'sti na priyaḥ samo+'haṃ · mṛgāṇāṃ ca mṛgendro 'haṃ vainateyaśca pakṣiṇām mṛgendro+'haṃ · īśvaro 'ham ahaṃ bhogī siddho 'haṃ balavānsukhī siddho+'haṃ
maccittā madgataprāṇā bodhayantaḥ parasparam mad+cittāḥ→maccittā · buddhiyogamupāśritya maccittaḥ satataṃ bhava mad+cittaḥ→maccittaḥ · maccittaḥ sarvadurgāṇi matprasādāttariṣyasi mad+cittaḥ→maccittaḥ
yogeśvara tato me tvaṃ darśayātmānamavyayam tato+me · abhyāsayogena tato māmicchāptuṃ dhanaṃjaya tato+mām · tato māṃ tattvato jñātvā viśate tadanantaram tato+māṃ

mā te vyathā mā ca vimūḍhabhāvo dṛṣṭvā rūpaṃ ghoramīdṛṅmamedam rūpaṃ+ghoram · śrotraṃ cakṣuḥ sparśanaṃ ca rasanaṃ ghrāṇameva ca rasanaṃ+ghrāṇam · aśāstravihitaṃ ghoraṃ tapyante ye tapo janāḥ vihitam→aśāstravihitaṃ +ghoraṃ

devā apyasya rūpasya nityaṃ darśanakāṅkṣiṇaḥ devā+api · jaghanyaguṇavṛttasthā adho gacchanti tāmasāḥ sthāḥ→jaghanyaguṇavṛttasthā +adho · nirmānamohā jitasaṅgadoṣā adhyātmanityā vinivṛttakāmāḥ doṣāḥ→jitasaṅgadoṣā +adhyātma

yadgatvā na nivartante taddhāma paramaṃ mama yat+gatvā→yadgatvā · mohādgṛhītvāsadgrāhānpravartante 'śucivratāḥ mohāt+gṛhītvā→mohādgṛhītvāsadgrāhānpravartante · iti te jñānamākhyātaṃ guhyādguhyataraṃ mayā guhyāt+guhyataram→guhyādguhyataraṃ
yāvadetānnirīkṣe 'haṃ yoddhukāmānavasthitān 'haṃ+yoddhu · yotsyamānānavekṣe 'haṃ ya ete 'tra samāgatāḥ 'haṃ+ya
yacchreyaḥ syānniścitaṃ brūhi tanme śiṣyaste 'haṃ śādhi māṃ tvāṃ prapannam syāt+niścitam→syānniścitaṃ · tannibadhnāti kaunteya karmasaṅgena dehinam tat+nibadhnāti→tannibadhnāti
dharmyāddhi yuddhācchreyo 'nyatkṣatriyasya na vidyate dharmyāt+hi→dharmyāddhi · etaddhi durlabhataraṃ loke janma yadīdṛśam etat+hi→etaddhi
atha cettvamimaṃ dharmyaṃ saṃgrāmaṃ na kariṣyasi ced+tvam→cettvamimaṃ · atha cettvamahaṃkārānna śroṣyasi vinaṅkṣyasi ced+tvam→cettvamahaṃkārānna
nindantastava sāmarthyaṃ tato duḥkhataraṃ nu kim tato+duḥkhataraṃ · kirīṭinaṃ gadinaṃ cakriṇaṃ ca tejorāśiṃ sarvato dīptimantam sarvato+dīptimantam
tasmāduttiṣṭha kaunteya yuddhāya kṛtaniścayaḥ tasmāt+uttiṣṭha→tasmāduttiṣṭha · sakheti matvā prasabhaṃ yaduktaṃ he kṛṣṇa he yādava he sakheti yat+uktam→yaduktaṃ
atha kena prayukto 'yaṃ pāpaṃ carati pūruṣaḥ 'yaṃ+pāpaṃ · śraddhāmayo 'yaṃ puruṣo yo yacchraddhaḥ sa eva saḥ 'yaṃ+puruṣo
śārīraṃ kevalaṃ karma kurvannāpnoti kilbiṣam kurvan+āpnoti→kurvannāpnoti · yatra caivātmanātmānaṃ paśyannātmani tuṣyati paśyan+ātmani→paśyannātmani
evaṃ bahuvidhā yajñā vitatā brahmaṇo mukhe vitatā+brahmaṇo · maccittā madgataprāṇā bodhayantaḥ parasparam prāṇāḥ→madgataprāṇā +bodhayantaḥ
yuñjannevaṃ sadātmānaṃ yogī niyatamānasaḥ yuñjan+evam→yuñjannevaṃ · yuñjannevaṃ sadātmānaṃ yogī vigatakalmaṣaḥ yuñjan+evam→yuñjannevaṃ
yatate ca tato bhūyaḥ saṃsiddhau kurunandana tato+bhūyaḥ · saṃbhavaḥ sarvabhūtānāṃ tato bhavati bhārata tato+bhavati
jñānaṃ te 'haṃ savijñānamidaṃ vakṣyāmyaśeṣataḥ 'haṃ+sa · samo 'haṃ sarvabhūteṣu na me dveṣyo 'sti na priyaḥ 'haṃ+sarva
udārāḥ sarva evaite jñānī tvātmaiva me matam tu+ātmā→tvātmaiva · viviktasevī laghvāśī yatavākkāyamānasaḥ laghu+āśī→laghvāśī

avyakto 'kṣara ityuktas tamāhuḥ paramāṃ gatim avyakto+'kṣara · kṣaraḥ sarvāṇi bhūtāni kūṭastho 'kṣara ucyate kūṭastho+'kṣara
yaṃ prāpya na nivartante taddhāma paramaṃ mama tat+dhāma→taddhāma · yadgatvā na nivartante taddhāma paramaṃ mama tat+dhāma→taddhāma
agnirjyotirahaḥ śuklaḥ ṣaṇmāsā uttarāyaṇam ṣaṣ+māsāḥ→ṣaṇmāsā · dhūmo rātristathā kṛṣṇaḥ ṣaṇmāsā dakṣiṇāyanam ṣaṣ+māsāḥ→ṣaṇmāsā
prakṛtiṃ svāmavaṣṭabhya visṛjāmi punaḥ punaḥ punaḥ+punaḥ · vismayo me mahānrājan hṛṣyāmi ca punaḥ punaḥ punaḥ+punaḥ
dyūtaṃ chalayatāmasmi tejastejasvināmaham dyūtaṃ+chalayatām · ṛṣibhirbahudhā gītaṃ chandobhirvividhaiḥ pṛthak gītaṃ+chandobhiḥ
eṣa tūddeśataḥ prokto vibhūtervistaro mayā tu+uddeśataḥ→tūddeśataḥ · bahūdaraṃ bahudaṃṣṭrākarālaṃ dṛṣṭvā lokāḥ pravyathitāstathāham bahu+udaram→bahūdaraṃ
yogeśvara tato me tvaṃ darśayātmānamavyayam yoga+īśvara→yogeśvara · yattu kāmepsunā karma sāhaṃkāreṇa vā punaḥ kāma+īpsunā→kāmepsunā
tatkṣetraṃ yacca yādṛkca yadvikāri yataśca yat yatas+ca→yataśca · adhaśca mūlānyanusaṃtatāni karmānubandhīni manuṣyaloke adhas+ca→adhaśca
vikārāṃśca guṇāṃścaiva viddhi prakṛtisaṃbhavān vikārān+ca→vikārāṃśca · vikārāṃśca guṇāṃścaiva viddhi prakṛtisaṃbhavān guṇān+ca→guṇāṃścaiva

śvaśurānsuhṛdaścaiva senayorubhayorapi eva→śvaśurānsuhṛdaścaiva +senayoḥ

gāṇḍīvaṃ sraṃsate hastāttvakcaiva paridahyate eva→hastāttvakcaiva +paridahyate
